message:
feat(core): add LIKE, CASE, CAST support to eval_join_expr (bd-3pss)

Extends the expression evaluator used by JOIN WHERE clauses and
GROUP BY expressions to handle LIKE/GLOB pattern matching, CASE/WHEN
expressions, and CAST type conversions. Adds simple_like_match and
simple_glob_match helpers with standard SQL wildcard semantics, and
apply_cast for type coercion. Includes 7 regression tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
